overview.title: Spec-Driven Development Pipeline
overview.description: Convert arcforge's one-shot brainstorming-refiner-planner pipeline into an iterable Spec-Driven Development workflow. Design docs become immutable raw sources; specs become live contracts updated via delta integration; DAGs become derived views that preserve execution state. Three foundational rules (R1 Human Consent, R2 Unidirectional Flow, R3 Block on Contradictions) govern the entire flow.

includes.feature: Path A/B routing, design doc structure (full and gamma mode), output validation
Filesystem-detected mode, blocking report, identity header, delta metadata output, input/output validation
Sprint model (always build from scratch), delta-scoped planning, DAG completion gate, 1:1 mapping, done signal, input/output validation
R1 (human consent), R2 (unidirectional), R3 (block on contradictions)
Directory structure for designs, specs, DAG (per-spec)
XML schema for spec self-identification, versioning, and delta metadata
Design Doc and Spec Identity Header format contracts — sdd-schemas/ (guidance) + sdd-utils.js (validation toolkit)
Input/output validation at each pipeline stage with three-tier severity, two-pass write, and deterministic/semantic split

excludes.reason: Cross-spec dependencies — deferred until multi-spec usage is established
Downstream migration (Phase 2) — coordinator.js per-spec DAG support, CLI --spec parameter, loop.js multi-spec parallelism, skill path updates, worktree marker spec_id

delta.modified: Remove REFINER_INPUT from Path A output
Remove structured Delta from Path B, gamma mode with natural language Change Intent
delta.removed: Change Type Derivation — replaced by output validation (fr-bs-007 repurposed)
delta.modified: Consolidate initial/iteration modes into single requirement
delta.removed: Separate iteration mode — merged into fr-rf-005
delta.added: Delta metadata output — refiner writes delta element to spec overview
delta.modified: Scope planning to delta requirements, not all requirements
delta.added: DAG completion gate — block if incomplete dag.yaml exists
delta.removed: Stale lint design-newer-than-spec — replaced by per-stage validation
Stale lint unrefined-design — replaced by per-stage validation
Stale lint unplanned-spec — replaced by per-stage validation
delta.modified: Clarify sdd-utils.js as validation toolkit, not merge engine
Add three-layer rationale for planner not reading design doc

constraint.title: Zero External Dependencies
constraint.description: Node.js standard library only. No npm runtime dependencies.

constraint.title: Three-Tier Validation Severity
constraint.description: All per-stage validation uses three severity levels: ERROR (blocks stage, no output produced), WARNING (continues but alerts user), INFO (informational). A stage is "valid" when it has zero ERRORs.

constraint.title: Self-Contained Stage Input
constraint.description: Each pipeline stage receives a self-contained input: the complete design doc for refiner, the complete spec.xml for planner. Stages MUST NOT rely on implicit context from prior conversation or session state.
